overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along wet city sidewalks at night. The journey progresses from an open area with massive red billboards through covered walkways with digital advertisements, past towering skyscrapers with neon signage, and under multi-level overpasses in a dense futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk under elevated highway with large advertising displays

events.description: purple sports car drives past on the wet road to the right

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian wearing bright green pants and a yellow jacket along the wet sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green pants walking ahead of the camera
purple sports car driving past on the wet road

entered.detail: massive vertical red digital billboard displaying fashion advertisements
large brutalist concrete highway overpass with massive support pillars
red and white striped concrete barriers separating sidewalk from road
tall pole with horizontal fluorescent light fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban sidewalk at night under a massive concrete overpass. The camera follows a pedestrian in green pants past large red digital billboards. A purple sports car drives by on the right as the camera moves forward along the reflective concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under massive concrete infrastructure

events.description: camera begins following a different pedestrian wearing a red sleeveless top
large red billboard exits view as walkway becomes more enclosed

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a red sleeveless top and beige pants deeper under the covered walkway

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red top walking ahead under the overpass

entered.detail: continuous wall of illuminated digital advertisements on the left building face
underside of massive highway structure forming a ceiling over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera switches to follow a pedestrian in a red top as the walkway becomes increasingly covered by the overpass above. Digital billboards line the left wall while the massive concrete infrastructure dominates overhead. The environment transitions from open to sheltered as the red billboard disappears behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian tunnel with continuous digital advertising displays

events.description: passing large purple neon billboard reading WET DREAM with bright pink lettering

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tunnel-like corridor passing illuminated advertisements on the left wall

entered.detail: large purple and pink neon advertisement with text WET DREAM
digital display showing fiery skeletal imagery with text
advertisement displaying text BODY WITHOUT LIMITS

segments.scene_description: The walkway becomes a fully enclosed tunnel with concrete ceiling overhead. The camera passes a series of bright digital billboards including a prominent purple WET DREAM advertisement and a flaming skeleton display. The environment is artificially lit with wet pavement reflecting the neon colors.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon with towering corporate skyscrapers and neon signage

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal tall skyscrapers with illuminated corporate signage
passing under orange-trimmed overpass structure with visible support cables

agents.ego_description: walking while looking up at the towering buildings and neon corporate signs overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the left side of the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive multi-story glass and steel tower with illuminated windows
yellow neon sign reading EL DORADO PAWN SHOP on building facade
white illuminated sign reading NOKOTA with arrow
blue neon corporate signage for ARASAKA
overpass with distinctive orange trim and support cables

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed tunnel, the camera tilts up to reveal towering skyscrapers covered in neon corporate signage including El Dorado Pawn Shop, Nokota, and Arasaka. The scene transitions to an urban canyon view with an orange-trimmed overpass structure visible as the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level overpass corridor with dense futuristic infrastructure

events.description: approaching darker tunnel section with atmospheric fog and multiple overpass levels

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under multiple layers of overpass infrastructure toward a darker tunnel section

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrian walking ahead in the foggy distance

entered.detail: multiple stacked highway levels creating dense overhead infrastructure
smooth concrete retaining wall along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves under dense multi-level overpass infrastructure with concrete walls on the left. The skyscraper signs disappear from view as the camera approaches a darker, foggy tunnel section ahead. A lone pedestrian is visible in the distance walking toward the tunnel entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked futuristic city that transitions from an open urban sidewalk into a claustrophobic tunnel before emerging into a canyon of skyscrapers. It begins under a massive concrete overpass, following a pedestrian past glowing red billboards as a purple sports car streaks across the reflective pavement. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes increasingly sheltered, shifting from an open walkway into a fully enclosed concrete tunnel lined with vivid digital advertisements, including a purple WET DREAM sign and a flaming skeleton. The scene then opens up as the camera exits the tunnel and tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers adorned with neon corporate signage for Arasaka and Nokota. Finally, the view narrows again as the camera passes under dense multi-level overpasses, moving away from the neon lights toward a dark, foggy tunnel entrance where a lone pedestrian walks into the distance.
